About.eyebrow: Used cars in Alicante · MB Plus Benidorm
About.title: Professional backing from Benidorm
About.intro: MB Plus Benidorm is a dealership specialised in the sale of pre-owned cars. More than 10 years of experience back our commitment to quality and transparency.
About.pillarWarrantyDesc: All our vehicles are delivered with a recent technical inspection and a warranty of up to 12 months or 10,000 km.
About.pillarWorkshopDesc: We inspect, prepare and maintain every car at our own facilities before delivery.
About.pillarSpecialistsDesc: Our main focus is Mercedes-Benz vehicles, although we also work with other well-known brands.
About.pillarExperienceDesc: More than a decade helping our customers find the car they need, at the price they are looking for.
